rating_policy_update.internal_rating_proxy_rule: legacy compatibility alias; same 1.0-5.0 scale as latest internal_match_rating_1_5, not external rating
rating_policy_update.notes: external_rating only when same-match same-source verified; internal_match_rating_1_5 is the project internal 1.0-5.0 match score. Legacy internal_rating_proxy, where present, mirrors that 1-5 value and is not an external rating.

rating_policy_note: external_rating is nullable and only populated when a reliable same-match same-source rating is available; otherwise rating_source_status/rating_missing_note explain the gap and internal_rating_proxy may mirror form_status_1_5 as a non-external model helper.

internal_match_rating_policy.rule: internal_match_rating_1_5 is project internal model score, based on verified minutes, role, events, cards, availability and form_status_1_5; it must not be presented as an external rating.

internal_match_rating_policy_note: internal_match_rating_1_5 is an internal model score, 1.0-5.0 with one decimal, derived from verified match events and form_status_1_5; it is not an external rating.
